violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): The hand washing faucet near the 3-compartment sink noted with no running water provided. The 3-compartment sink is not an acceptable location to wash hands. The faucet and sink (handsink) next to the 3-compartment sink must be repaired by 4-23-26. Re-inspection will occur on or before 4-23-26.

CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Box of food noted being stored on the floor. Biscuits with torn packaging noted open without a cover on the storage shelf. These biscuits need to be protected with a cover or wrapped with plastic wrap to prevent contamination.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Cups noted being stored on the floor.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reach-in cooler interior and door gasket located in the back room noted not clean.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): The hand washing lavatory noted with no running water provided. Hotel knew about this and maintenance replaced while inspector present. Corrected.
